subject: [PATCH 2/3] nfsd: fix NULL deref / UAF of sc_export in setup_notify_fhandle

2026-06-17.patch_summary: This patch fixes two issues in the NFS server code: a NULL dereference and a use-after-free bug. The bug occurs when an admin revokes a delegation, which can cause the export to be cleared and its reference dropped independently of the sc_count reference held by the CB_NOTIFY callback. To fix this, the patch grabs a reference to the export under the client's lock and guards every use of the export with a NULL check. This ensures that the export is not accessed after it has been freed or cleared, preventing both the NULL dereference and use-after-free bugs.
